{{CargoRelic
|name=The Picture of Dorian Gray
|class_id=21357
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The Picture of Dorian Gray is a novel by Oscar Wilde. It tells the story of Dorian Gray, a handsome young man who remains eternally youthful while a portrait of him ages and bears the consequences of his immoral actions. As Dorian indulges in a life of hedonism and corruption, the painting becomes a haunting reflection of his soul. The novel explores themes of vanity, morality, and the duality of human nature, cementing its place as a classic in literature.
|fame=52
|art=47
|fth=37
|civ=72
|tech=35
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
